user: How long will it take me to complete my course
bot: Most standard courses run for one semester or a few months. Short trainings or bootcamps are more intensive and can last from a few days to a few weeks.

user: How many hours per week will be visiting the school
bot: Plan around 6‐9 hours per week for a technical course: watching lessons, doing labs, and revising. Small, regular study sessions work better than last‑minute cramming. Don't rush—understanding concepts deeply is more important than speed.

Python is a popular, beginner‑friendly programming language used for web development, data analysis, automation, AI, and cybersecurity scripting. It is known for simple, readable code and is one of the most in-demand languages in tech today. Many cybersecurity professionals use Python for writing security tools and automating tasks.

To install Python: go to python.org, download the latest stable version, run the installer, and select 'Add Python to PATH'. This is important! On Linux, use your package manager such as apt or dnf. On Mac, you can download directly or use Homebrew. After installation, open a terminal and type 'python --version' to verify.
